papers.title_en: Application of a multimodal MRI model integrating radiomics and habitat features for predicting glioma pathology and prognosis
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在通过整合多模态MRI的影像组学与生境（habitat）特征，构建一个综合模型来预测胶质瘤的病理分级及预后（如IDH突变和Ki-67指数）。针对现有研究多关注单一任务的局限，该方法通过深入挖掘肿瘤内部异质性，显著提升了对胶质瘤关键分子生物标志物的评估准确性，为临床精准诊疗提供了重要的决策支持。
papers.abstract_en: Background: Accurate grading and prognostic assessment of glioma requiresintegrating key molecular biomarkers, including IDH mutation status and the Ki-67proliferation index. However, current radiomics studies often focus on single-task …

papers.title_en: Interpretable MRI-based multiparametric radiomics for preoperative prediction of CMS4 colorectal cancer
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在解决结直肠癌（CRC）中CMS4分子亚型难以无创识别的问题。通过分析多参数MRI影像组学特征，研究团队开发并验证了一个可解释的预测模型。结果表明，该模型能有效在术前识别CMS4亚型，为临床医生提供了一种非侵入性的评估工具，有助于优化患者的预后评估和个体化治疗策略。
papers.abstract_en: Background Consensus molecular subtypes (CMSs) are associated with prognosticand clinical outcomes in colorectal cancer (CRC); however, effective noninvasivemethods for CMS4 identification are limited. Purpose To evaluate whether a …

papers.title_en: Automated PI-RADS 3–5 Classification Using Multiparametric MRI: A Comparative Study of Radiomics and Deep Learning Approaches
papers.tldr: 本研究针对临床显著性前列腺癌分类的挑战，利用多参数核磁共振成像（mpMRI）数据，对比了影像组学与深度学习在PI-RADS 3–5级病变自动分类中的表现。研究旨在提高前列腺癌诊断的准确性，为临床决策提供自动化支持，并探讨了不同技术路径在处理复杂影像特征时的优劣，为实现更精准的癌症筛查提供了技术参考。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate classification of clinically significant prostate cancer remains a majorchallenge. While multiparametric MRI (mpMRI) has improved lesion detection,effective categorization in accordance to the Prostate Imaging Reporting and Data …

papers.title_en: Multiparametric Machine Learning Model Selection for Improved Survival Prediction In Lung Cancer: Using Semi-Supervised Learning and PET-CT Fusion Tensor …
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在提升肺癌患者的生存预测精度，针对现有AI设备在临床应用中的性能差异，提出了一种基于半监督学习的多参数机器学习模型。该方法利用PET-CT融合张量技术，有效整合了多模态影像数据，解决了标注数据不足的问题。研究结果表明，该模型在生存预测方面表现优异，为优化肺癌个性化诊疗路径和临床AI设备的选择提供了重要的技术支持与理论依据。
papers.abstract_en: Background Various commercial artificial intelligence (AI) devices can identify lungcancer features on chest radiographs. Understanding their relative performancewithin the same patient population and health care setting is essential for making …

papers.title_en: Independent head-to-head comparison of commercial artificial intelligence devices for lung cancer detection on chest radiographs
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多种商业化人工智能（AI）设备在胸部X射线片肺癌检测中的表现进行了独立的直接对比。通过在相同的患者群体和医疗背景下评估这些设备的性能，研究旨在为医疗机构选择最合适的AI工具提供依据。结果显示不同设备间存在性能差异，强调了在实际临床应用前进行独立验证的重要性，为优化肺癌早期筛查流程提供了关键参考。
papers.abstract_en: Background Various commercial artificial intelligence (AI) devices can identify lungcancer features on chest radiographs. Understanding their relative performancewithin the same patient population and health care setting is essential for making …

papers.title_en: 177Lu-PSMA-617 SPECT/CT for early prediction of overall survival in participants with metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了177Lu-PSMA-617 SPECT/CT影像在预测转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）患者总生存期（OS）中的价值。通过分析接受177Lu-PSMA-617治疗患者的早期影像数据，研究证实了该技术作为疗效预测生物标志物的潜力。这一成果为临床早期评估治疗反应和优化患者管理提供了重要依据，有助于实现更精准的个性化治疗。
papers.abstract_en: Background Lutetium 177 (177 Lu) prostate-specific membrane antigen (PSMA)-617SPECT/CT has demonstrated promise as a response biomarker for 177 Lu-PSMA-617 therapy. Purpose To predict overall survival (OS) after enzalutamide plus 177 Lu …

papers.title_en: Robust deep learning for incomplete MRI sequences in glioma grading and IDH mutation status prediction: a large-scale multicenter study
papers.tldr: 本研究针对临床中常见的MRI序列不完整问题，提出了一种鲁棒的深度学习方法，用于胶质瘤分级和IDH突变状态的无创预测。通过大规模多中心数据验证，该模型在序列缺失的情况下仍能保持高准确性，克服了传统影像组学模型对完整数据的依赖，为胶质瘤的精准诊疗提供了可靠的技术支撑。
papers.abstract_en: Objectives Incomplete MRI sequences pose a significant challenge to the reliabilityof multiparametric MRI (mp-MRI) radiomics models. This study aimed to develop arobust and noninvasive approach for accurate glioma grading and isocitrate …

papers.title_en: PD23-02 PROSTATE-SPECIFIC ANTIGEN ENDPOINTS IN THE PHASE 3 PSMADDITION STUDY OF [177LU] LU-PSMA-617 (177LU-PSMA-617) COMBINED WITH …
papers.tldr: 本研究是PSMAddition三期临床试验，旨在评估[177Lu]Lu-PSMA-617联合标准治疗（SOC）在转移性激素敏感性前列腺癌（mHSPC）患者中的疗效。研究招募了PSMA阳性的初治或微量治疗患者，通过随机对照试验对比了联合疗法与单一SOC在PSA终点上的表现。该研究为mHSPC的早期放射配体治疗提供了关键的临床证据，展示了其在改善患者预后方面的潜力。
papers.abstract_en: METHODS: Eligible male patients had treatment-naive/minimally treated (≤ 45 daysbefore consent) mHSPC and≥ 1 PSMA+ metastatic lesion on [68 Ga] Ga-PSMA-11PET/CT. Patients were randomized 1: 1 to 177 Lu-PSMA-617 (7.4 GBq±10% q6w, 6 …

papers.title_en: ComboLoss for NECT Liver Tumor Segmentation: An Imbalance-Aware nnU-Net v2 Baseline
papers.tldr: 本研究针对非增强CT（NECT）中肝脏肿瘤分割面临的对比度低、前景背景严重失衡及微小病灶多等挑战，提出了一种基于nnU-Net v2的改进基准模型。通过引入ComboLoss损失函数，有效缓解了类别不平衡问题，为NECT肝脏肿瘤分割提供了一个紧凑且可复现的强力基线。
papers.abstract_en: Non-enhanced CT (NECT) liver tumor segmentation remains challenging due toweak lesion–parenchyma contrast, severe foreground–background imbalance, andthe prevalence of very small lesions. To provide a compact and reproducible …

papers.title_en: Region–patch aware soft-attention network for hepatocellular carcinoma histopathology: context-guided multi-view fusion with deep ROI supervision
papers.tldr: 针对肝细胞癌（HCC）病理全扫描图像因超高分辨率、病变形态不规则及局部背景信息不足导致的分类难题，本文提出一种区域-补丁感知的软注意力网络。该网络通过上下文引导的多视图融合与深度ROI监督机制，实现了对病理特征的精准提取与整合。研究证明该方法能显著提升HCC组织病理图像的分类准确率，为复杂医学影像的自动化分析提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Due to ultra-high resolution, irregular lesion morphology, and limited backgroundinformation in local regions, the accurate classification of hepatocellular carcinomabased on hematoxylin-and-eosin (H&E) whole-slide images remains challenging. To …

papers.title_en: Fine-Grained Analysis of Shared Syntactic Mechanisms in Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了语言模型内部机制是否符合语言学中的跨结构原则。通过对模型处理不同句法结构时的内部表示进行细粒度分析，研究者旨在揭示模型在处理如主谓一致等任务时，是否使用了通用的神经机制。研究发现模型在不同句法任务间存在共享的底层逻辑，这为理解大模型的语言习得与泛化能力提供了重要见解。
papers.abstract_en: While language models demonstrate sophisticated syntactic capabilities, the extentto which their internal mechanisms align with cross-constructional principles studiedin linguistics remains poorly understood. This study investigates whether models …

papers.title_en: VeriLLMed: Interactive Visual Debugging of Medical Large Language Models with Knowledge Graphs
papers.tldr: VeriLLMed是一个利用知识图谱对医疗大语言模型进行交互式可视化调试的系统。针对医疗诊断中LLM推理可靠性不足的问题，该研究通过结合知识图谱的结构化知识，帮助用户检查和分析模型的决策过程。该工具旨在提高医疗AI的透明度，确保高风险临床决策的安全性，是提升医疗LLM可解释性的重要尝试。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) show promise in medical diagnosis, but real-worlddeployment remains challenging due to high-stakes clinical decisions and imperfectreasoning reliability. As a result, careful inspection of model behavior is essential for …

papers.title_en: SycoPhantasy: Quantifying Sycophancy and Hallucination in Small Open Weight VLMs for Vision-Language Scoring of Fantasy Characters
papers.tldr: 本研究针对小型开源视觉语言模型（VLM）在奇幻角色图像-文本对齐评分中的可靠性进行了深入探讨。通过提出 SycoPhantasy 评估框架，研究者量化了模型在评分过程中表现出的“阿谀奉承”（盲目顺从用户偏好）和“幻觉”现象。研究揭示了这些模型在作为自动化评估器时存在的严重偏见与失实问题，为未来开发更客观、鲁棒的视觉语言评估工具提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed as evaluators in tasksrequiring nuanced image understanding, yet their reliability in scoring alignmentbetween images and text descriptions remains underexplored. We investigate …

papers.title_en: Learning to Route Queries to Heads for Attention-based Re-ranking with Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型（LLM）在零样本重排序任务中利用注意力信号估计文档相关性的局限性，提出了一种学习将查询路由到特定注意力头的方法。现有方法通常盲目聚合所有头的信号，而本文通过识别并利用对相关性判断最有效的注意力头，优化了重排序性能。该方法在保持零样本优势的同时，显著提升了排序的精准度，为基于注意力的信息检索提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently been explored as fine-grained zero-shot re-rankers by leveraging attention signals to estimate document relevance.However, existing methods either aggregate attention signals across all heads or …

papers.title_en: Marco-MoE: Open Multilingual Mixture-of-Expert Language Models with Efficient Upcycling
papers.tldr: Marco-MoE 是一套开源的多语言稀疏混合专家（MoE）模型，旨在通过高效的“上循环”技术提升多语言处理能力。该模型采用极高稀疏度设计，每个 token 仅激活约 5% 的参数，在保持高性能的同时显著降低了推理计算开销，为开源社区提供了兼顾效率与性能的多语言大模型方案。
papers.abstract_en: We present Marco-MoE, a suite of fully open multilingual sparse Mixture-of-Experts(MoE) models. Marco-MoE features a highly sparse design in which only around 5\%of the total parameters are activated per input token. This extreme sparsity, combined …

papers.title_en: HealthBench Professional: Evaluating Large Language Models on Real Clinician Chats
papers.tldr: 随着数百万临床医生使用ChatGPT辅助诊疗，评估LLM在真实临床对话中的表现变得至关重要。本研究推出了HealthBench Professional，这是一个专门针对真实医生与模型交互场景设计的开放评估基准。该基准填补了现有评估在实际临床用例上的空白，为衡量大模型在医疗专业环境下的实用性和安全性提供了标准化工具。
papers.abstract_en: Millions of clinicians use ChatGPT to support clinical care, but evaluations of themost common use cases in model-clinician conversations are limited. We introduceHealthBench Professional, an open benchmark for evaluating large language …

papers.title_en: Safety and accuracy follow different scaling laws in clinical large language models
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了临床大模型中准确性与安全性之间的关系，挑战了“高准确性即意味着高安全性”的传统假设。通过分析模型规模、上下文长度、检索复杂度和推理计算等维度的缩放效应，研究发现两者遵循不同的缩放法则。这一发现强调了在医疗AI开发中，必须建立独立的安全性评估体系，而不能仅依赖性能指标来衡量临床风险，为构建更可靠的医疗大模型提供了重要指导。
papers.abstract_en: Clinical LLMs are often scaled by increasing model size, context length, retrievalcomplexity, or inference-time compute, with the implicit expectation that higheraccuracy implies safer behavior. This assumption is incomplete in medicine, where a …

papers.title_en: Implicit Representations of Grammaticality in Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了预训练语言模型中语法性与似然性之间的关系。虽然语言模型以最大化语料库似然性为目标，但其生成的文本通常符合语法。研究通过分析模型内部表示，揭示了模型如何隐式地编码语法性信息，并区分了概率高低与语法正确性，为理解大模型的语言处理机制提供了新视角。
papers.abstract_en: Grammaticality and likelihood are distinct notions in human language. Pretrainedlanguage models (LMs), which are probabilistic models of language fitted tomaximize corpus likelihood, generate grammatically well-formed text and …

papers.title_en: Teaching Language Models to Think in Code
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了大型语言模型在数学推理中的工具集成推理（TIR）范式。针对现有自然语言与代码交替推理模式在逻辑连贯性上的局限，提出了一种让模型直接以代码形式进行思考的方法。通过优化模型生成代码逻辑的能力，该方法显著提升了复杂数学问题的解决效率和准确性，为强化模型逻辑推理能力提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Tool-integrated reasoning (TIR) has emerged as a dominant paradigm formathematical problem solving in language models, combining natural language (NL)reasoning with code execution. However, this interleaved setup has three key …

papers.title_en: Experience Sharing in Mutual Reinforcement Learning for Heterogeneous Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对异构大语言模型在强化学习后训练中的协作难题，提出了“互助强化学习”框架。该框架允许具有不同参数、目标函数和分词器的模型在保持各自独立性的同时，通过交换特定类型的经验进行并发训练。这一方法打破了模型架构间的壁垒，显著提升了异构模型在复杂任务中的学习效率和性能，为多模型协同进化提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: We introduce Mutual Reinforcement Learning, a framework for concurrent RL post-training in which heterogeneous LLM policies exchange typed experience whilekeeping separate parameters, objectives, and tokenizers. The framework combines a …

papers.title_en: STARFlow2: Bridging Language Models and Normalizing Flows for Unified Multimodal Generation
papers.tldr: STARFlow2 提出了一种将语言模型与归一化流（Normalizing Flows）相结合的新框架，旨在实现统一的多模态生成。该研究针对现有模型在处理交错文本图像序列时的局限性，通过桥接两种技术，增强了系统对多模态内容的理解、推理和生成能力，为构建通用的多模态智能体提供了高效且一致的生成方案。
papers.abstract_en: Deep generative models have advanced rapidly across text and vision, motivatingunified multimodal systems that can understand, reason over, and generateinterleaved text-image sequences. Most existing approaches combine …

papers.title_en: Mid-Training with Self-Generated Data Improves Reinforcement Learning in Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在强化学习（RL）阶段对数据多样性的依赖，提出了一种“中期训练”（Mid-Training）方法。该方法利用模型自身生成的多种推理路径数据进行预训练，旨在增强模型在正式RL之前的推理能力和探索效率。实验证明，这种自生成数据的中期训练能显著提升模型在复杂推理任务上的表现，为优化RL训练流程提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: The effectiveness of Reinforcement Learning (RL) in Large Language Models(LLMs) depends on the nature and diversity of the data used before and during RL.In particular, reasoning problems can often be approached in multiple ways that rely …

papers.title_en: Edit-Based Refinement for Parallel Masked Diffusion Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对掩码扩散语言模型在并行生成多个token时性能显著下降的问题，本文提出了一种基于编辑的细化方法。该方法通过引入编辑操作对初步生成的文本进行修正，在保持并行生成效率优势的同时，显著提升了生成质量，为实现高效且高质量的非自回归文本生成提供了新的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Masked diffusion language models enable parallel token generation and offerimproved decoding efficiency over autoregressive models. However, theirperformance degrades significantly when generating multiple tokens simultaneously …

papers.title_en: Scratchpad Patching: Decoupling Compute from Patch Size in Byte-Level Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对无分词器（tokenizer-free）字节级语言模型中计算量与补丁（patch）大小耦合的问题，提出了 Scratchpad Patching 方法。该方法通过将计算过程从固定的补丁尺寸中解耦，允许模型在处理不同长度的字节序列时灵活分配计算资源。这种方法在保持字节级建模优势的同时，显著提高了推理效率和模型性能，为构建更高效的原始字节处理模型提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Tokenizer-free language models eliminate the tokenizer step of the languagemodeling pipeline by operating directly on bytes; patch-based variants furtheraggregate contiguous byte spans into patches for efficiency. However, the average …

papers.title_en: A Comparative Analysis of CT Degradation for LDCT Nodule Classification using Radiomics
papers.tldr: 本研究针对低剂量CT（LDCT）噪声高的问题，对比分析了多种CT降质模拟方法对肺结节影像组学分类的影响。通过模拟从标准剂量到低剂量的图像退化过程，研究探讨了不同噪声模型在结节分类任务中的表现差异，为LDCT图像处理和辅助诊断算法的开发提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Low-dose computed tomography (LDCT) is the standard modality for lung cancerscreening, known for its low radiation dose but high noise levels. While existingliterature focuses on denoising LDCT images, comparative research on simulating …

papers.title_en: Multi-Stream LLMs: Unblocking Language Models with Parallel Streams of Thoughts, Inputs and Outputs
papers.tldr: 随着大语言模型在编程和计算机操作等自主代理领域的广泛应用，传统的串行处理模式已成为效率瓶颈。本文提出了多流大语言模型（Multi-Stream LLMs），通过并行化思维流、输入流和输出流，打破了模型在复杂任务中的阻塞限制。该研究为提升智能体的并发处理能力和响应速度提供了新的架构思路，是构建高效自主系统的关键进展。
papers.abstract_en: The continued improvements in language model capability have unlocked theirwidespread use as drivers of autonomous agents, for example in coding or computeruse applications. However, the core of these systems has not changed much since …

papers.title_en: Learning to See What You Need: Gaze Attention for Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对当前多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在处理图像时缺乏人类视觉选择性关注的问题，提出了“凝视注意力”（Gaze Attention）机制。该方法通过模拟人类在描述场景时的视线追踪行为，使模型能够聚焦于与任务相关的关键区域。实验证明，这种机制显著提升了模型在视觉描述和理解任务中的表现，使其输出更符合人类的认知逻辑，增强了模型的视觉感知能力。
papers.abstract_en: When humans describe a visual scene, they do not process the entire imageuniformly; instead, they selectively fixate on regions relevant to their intendeddescription. In contrast, current multimodal large language models (MLLMs) attend to …

papers.title_en: Query-Conditioned Test-Time Self-Training for Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型（LLM）参数固定且推理时缩放难以纠正模型固有错误的问题，提出了一种基于查询条件的测试时自我训练方法。该方法允许模型在推理阶段针对特定查询动态调整参数，通过自我训练提升生成质量。实验证明，这种测试时自适应策略能有效增强模型性能，为超越传统推理缩放提供了新路径。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) are typically deployed with fixed parameters, andtheir performance is often improved by allocating more computation at inferencetime. While such test-time scaling can be effective, it cannot correct model …

papers.title_en: PDCR: Perception-Decomposed Confidence Reward for Vision-Language Reasoning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对视觉语言推理任务中强化学习奖励信号稀疏的问题，提出了感知分解置信度奖励（PDCR）。传统方法主要依赖稀疏的结果反馈，而PDCR通过将感知过程分解，并以模型对正确答案置信度的增长作为细粒度的内在奖励信号，从而更有效地引导模型学习复杂的推理逻辑。该方法显著增强了视觉语言模型在处理复杂推理任务时的表现和训练效率。
papers.abstract_en: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) traditionally relies on asparse, outcome-based signal. Recent work shows that providing a fine-grained,model-intrinsic signal (rewarding the confidence growth in the ground-truth answer) …

papers.title_en: RoiMAM: Region-of-Interest Medical Attention Model for Efficient Vision-Language Understanding
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医学视觉问答（MedVQA）中现有模型架构庞大且受限于闭集回答的问题，提出了RoiMAM（感兴趣区域医学注意力模型）。该模型通过引入感兴趣区域（RoI）机制，实现了高效的视觉语言理解。RoiMAM在保持轻量化的同时，提升了模型处理开放式问题的能力，为高效、灵活的医学影像分析提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) facilitate medical visual question answering(MedVQA) by jointly interpreting images and text. However, existing models typicallydepend on large architectures and closed-set answers, which limits their efficiency …

papers.title_en: Vision Inference Former: Sustaining Visual Consistency in Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在整合视觉与文本信息时难以维持视觉一致性的问题，提出了 Vision Inference Former (VIF)。该方法改进了传统的连接器范式，通过引入专门的推理机制来增强视觉特征的对齐与持久性。实验表明，VIF 能显著提升模型在复杂多模态任务中的表现，为构建更稳定、一致的多模态理解系统提供了关键的技术支撑。
papers.abstract_en: In recent years, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achievedremarkable progress, primarily attributed to effective paradigms for integrating visualand textual information. The dominant connector-based paradigm projects visual …

papers.title_en: Speech-Guided Multimodal Learning for Vocal Tract Segmentation in Real-Time MRI
papers.tldr: 本研究针对实时磁共振成像（rtMRI）中声道器官分割面临的低对比度、快速运动和低空间分辨率等挑战，提出了一种语音引导的多模态学习方法。该方法利用与rtMRI同步的语音信号作为辅助信息，通过跨模态特征融合提升分割精度。研究证明，结合语音特征能有效弥补图像质量的不足，为动态声道形态学分析提供了更鲁棒的自动化工具。
papers.abstract_en: Segmenting vocal tract articulators in real-time MRI (rtMRI) is a challenging dynamicimage segmentation problem characterized by low contrast, rapid motion, and limitedspatial resolution. However, while rtMRI acquisitions may provide synchronized …
